prediction.summary: A critical data exfiltration incident has been detected involving the 'svc_etl' account on host 10.20.3.15. Over 1.1GB of data, including sensitive financial PII from '/data/finance_q2.zip', was uploaded via 'curl' to the external domain 'upload.evil-cdn.net' (185.220.101.44). Multiple security systems, including DLP, firewall, SIEM, and IDS, confirmed the suspicious activity and flagged it as a data exfiltration pattern.

timeline.event: Outbound anomaly detected: '10.20.3.15' sent 1.1GB to '185.220.101.44' in 77 seconds.
Sensitive label 'FINANCE_PII' detected in outbound transfer by 'svc_etl'.
Data exfiltration pattern identified: large encrypted upload to rare external domain.
MITRE T1041 Exfiltration Over C2 Channel suspected from host '10.20.3.15'.
Volume spike detected: '10.20.3.15' to '185.220.101.44:443' at 14x baseline.
CRITICAL alert for data exfiltration by user 'svc_etl' to 'upload.evil-cdn.net'.

recommendations: Immediately isolate host 10.20.3.15 from the network to prevent further data loss or lateral movement.
Block the destination domain 'upload.evil-cdn.net' and IP address '185.220.101.44' at the firewall and proxy.
Disable or reset credentials for the 'svc_etl' account and revoke all active sessions.
Conduct a forensic analysis of host 10.20.3.15 to identify the initial compromise vector, persistence mechanisms, and any other compromised data.
Notify legal and privacy teams regarding the confirmed exfiltration of 'FINANCE_PII' and '/data/finance_q2.zip'.
